prose: TEMPO frontier-orbital analysis via DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier standard, density-fit in PySCF) on the user-supplied geometry in gas phase at charge 0, multiplicity 2 (radical). SCF converged in 12 cycles. HOMO–LUMO gap = **3.8724 eV** (Koopmans vertical gap); HOMO = −6.3375 eV, LUMO = −2.4651 eV. Orbital descriptors (vertical IP, EA, electronegativity, hardness, electrophilicity) also computed and reported above.
